text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Self-Rewarding Language Models" is real, but its actual authors are Weizhe Yuan, Richard Yuanzhe Pang, Kyunghyun Cho, Sainbayar Sukhbaatar, Jing Xu, and Jason Weston (arXiv:2401.10020, 2024). The cited authors (Daniel Ziegler, Long Ouyang, Jeffrey Wu, Ryan Lowe, etc.) and the cited arXiv ID (2210.01152) are entirely wrong — the arXiv ID points to an unrelated physics paper. This is a classic hallucination pattern: a real title grafted onto fabricated metadata.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.10020
